name: (Set of 2) 16" x 20" Painterly Collage Framed Under Glass Wall Art Prints  - Threshold™: Modern Abstract Art, Sawtooth Back
description:
Make a bold statement in any room with this (Set of 2) 16" x 20" Painterly Collage Framed Wall Art from Threshold™. These framed wall art pieces feature lively colors, adding an instant pop of creativity to your space. The natural frames provide a touch of rustic charm while complementing your décor. Easy to hang and wonderful to admire, the (Set of 2) 16" x 20" Painterly Collage Framed Wall Art from Threshold™ are the perfect way to refresh your space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
